title: satyrium atlanticum
intro: Satyrium atlanticum, also known as the Atlantic yellow orchid, is a species of orchid native to the coastal regions of the Mediterranean. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues due to its rich content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Satyrium atlanticum include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Satyrium atlanticum have been made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support digestive health and relieve respiratory symptoms.
